data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: YouTube is built on a microservices architecture allowing modular and scalable component deployment.
data.technical_spec: Each microservice is independently deployable and loosely coupled, enabling flexibility and scalability.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: CDNs are used to store copies of videos closer to users to improve loading times.
data.technical_spec: Data is distributed globally across numerous CDN servers to ensure high availability and low latency.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Ensures even distribution of inbound requests across all servers to maintain performance.
data.technical_spec: Employs hardware and software-based load balancing to efficiently manage network traffic.

data.title: Cloud Computing
data.description: Utilizes cloud infrastructure to handle massive data storage and processing requirements.
data.technical_spec: Leverages Google Cloud Platform for scalability, reliability, and resource management.

data.title: Data Replication
data.description: Critical for maintaining data integrity and availability across global data centers.
data.technical_spec: Data is replicated in real-time to multiple locations to ensure high availability and disaster recovery.
